ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value used for evaluation */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* True negatives */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* False positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* False negatives */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* True positives */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was performed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for evaluation */,
  "test_size" REAL /* Proportion of the dataset used for testing */,
  "cross_validation_folds" INTEGER /* Number of folds used in cross-validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation from which the metrics are calculated */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the dashboard */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being displayed */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_file" TEXT /* File path to the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., interactive, static) */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
